title: Egeland Warns Europe Faces Hundreds of Thousands Of Ukrainian Refugees This Winter
excerpt: Egeland Warns Europe Faces Hundreds of Thousands Of Ukrainian Refugees This Winter Jan Egeland, the head of the Norwegian Refugee Council (NRC), said in an interview with Euronews that there will be hundreds of thousands of Ukrainian refugees this coming winter. "It is really a choice between freeze or fleeing," he said. "Therefore, very many people are voluntarily fleeing… Europe has to prepare for hundreds of thousands of new refugees this winter, from Norway in the north to the southern European countries." "We're in a race against the clock," Egeland said. "I've been travelling all through the south and the east of Ukraine ... and every city you go to is dark and people are freezing."

title: Mehr als eine Million Mexikaner demonstrieren zur Unterstützung der Regierung
